title: [Immersive Vehicles] R.A.G.E - Best cars to drive!
description: A pack that will add different cars to your Minecraft
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/911fb9f251663b12c1b8f77cdcd0f40cd7b279c8.jpeg)
## ABOUT

This is a pack that is cars from the real world. This pack have more than 10 cars.

I would like this project to be developed with your opinion as well,

so you can easily go to the Discord Server and suggest your ideas and just find a new community.

Discord: https://discord.gg/eHEdaY82dk


##  FAQ

👨‍💻 - Question

🕵️‍♂️ - Answer


👨‍💻 How to download this pack?

🕵️‍♂️ Same as other MTS packs

👨‍💻 Why cars are small compared to *insert other pack name*

🕵️‍♂️ My cars are made in 1:1 size to the world, unlike most packs which are made in Steve:1 size

👨‍💻 When 1.19, 1.20 or other newer versions?

🕵️‍♂️ Nothing depends on me, because R.A.G.E is just a pack for Immersive Vehicles, which has the latest version 1.16.5.
